questionHtml: Explain the function of the left ventricle.
markschemeHtml:
1. contracts to generate high pressure / pumps blood at high pressure;
  2. pump blood (through the aorta) to all parts of the body (apart from the lungs);
  3. receives blood from the left atrium;
  4. contraction is stimulated by the AV node;

meta.title: Explain the function of the left ventricle.
breadcrumbLabels: B3.2.15. Adaptations of the mammalian heart for delivering pressurized blood to the arteries
